steps.title: Identify the key contrast
steps.content: The passage uses “But” to signal a contrast: the Highwaymen share compositional structures and subjects, but individuals introduced variations within that framework.

steps.title: Match the structure to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A correctly describes the two-part structure: a shared aesthetic framework, then the claim—illustrated through Sam Newton—that individuals introduced variations within it.

The other three either mischaracterize the tone as reinforcing unoriginality (B), invent historical context and multiple explorations not in the text (C), or focus on collaboration and influence rather than individuation (D).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
